__fixture_tag__: SAMPLE FIXTURE — not real data, for selftest replay only
__source__: NIMS Materials Database (MatNavi / MITS) record schema (illustrative); real fetch via https://mits.nims.go.jp/ + https://mat-navi.nims.go.jp/ web search (no public REST; per-record HTML/PDF download with NIMS account)
__honest_note__: NIMS Materials Database (Japan, 2024 release) carries BOTH experimental and computed records — distinct from MP / OMat24 / OQMD / AFLOW / NOMAD (predictions only) and from COD (experimental crystal structures only). Mechanical / creep-rupture / corrosion / polymer / alloy data, ~50,000 records. This fixture represents an EXPERIMENTAL mechanical-properties record per the record_type field; the adapter enforces the type tag so prediction and measurement records cannot be silently conflated.

test_condition.specimen_geometry: round bar, ASTM E8/E8M standard subsize

record_type_note: MEASURED in NIMS / vendor lab per ASTM E8/E8M tensile test; provenance lives in the cited mill certificate + the NIMS MatNavi data sheet

publication.primary: NIMS Materials Database (MatNavi) 2024 release — austenitic stainless steel mechanical properties data sheet
publication.secondary: NIMS Structural Materials Database — Creep Data Sheet series (Cr-Ni austenitic stainless steel sub-series)

search_endpoint_template: https://mits.nims.go.jp/index_en.html (web search; per-record HTML; no public REST)
license: CC-BY 4.0 (NIMS open data portal — see https://www.nims.go.jp/eng/publicity/digital/open_data/index.html; citation required to NIMS MatNavi 2024)
